english translation text: Du`a for 28th Night of Ramadhan

arabic text: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ
english translation text: In the name of Allah the Beneficent, the Merciful.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah, bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.

arabic text: يَا خَازِنَ ٱللَّيْلِ فِي ٱلْهَوَاءِ، وَخَازِنَ ٱلنُّورِ فِي ٱلسَّمَاءِ
english translation text: O (One) who keeps safe the night in the atmosphere, and keeps safe the light in the sky,

arabic text: وَمَانِعَ ٱلسَّمَاءِ اَنْ تَقَعَ عَلَىٰ ٱلاَّرْضِ إِلاَّ بِإِذْنِهِ
english translation text: and prevents the sky to fall on the earth except by His permission,

arabic text: وَحَابِسَهُمَا اَنْ تَزُولاَ
english translation text: and holds them back lest they move away.

arabic text: يَا عَلِيمُ يَا عَظِيمُ، يَا غَفُورُ يَا دَائِمُ
english translation text: O All­-Knowing, O Mighty, O Forgiver, O Eternal,

arabic text: يَا اللَّهُ يَا وَارِثُ، يَا بَاعِثَ مَنْ فِي القُبُورِ
english translation text:
O Allah, O Inheritor,
O (One) who will raise those in the graves.

arabic text: يا اَللّهُ يا اَللّهُ يا اَللّهُ لَكَ الاْسْماَّءُ الْحُسْنى
english translation text: O Allah, O Allah, O Allah, You have the most beautiful names,

arabic text: وَالاْمْثالُ الْعُلْيا وَالْكِبْرِياَّءُ وَالاْ لاَّءُ
english translation text: the highest examples, the grandeur, the bounties.

arabic text: اَسْئَلُكَ اَنْ تُصَلِّىَ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
english translation text: I beseech You to bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad,

arabic text: وَاَنْ تَجْعَلَ اسْمى فِى هذِهِ اللَّيْلَةِ فِى السُّعَداَّءِ
english translation text: and place my name, in this night, among the fortunate,

arabic text: وَرُوحى مَعَ الشُّهَداَّءِ وَاِحْسانى فى عِلِّيّينَ، وَاِسائَتى مَغْفُورَةً
english translation text: and my soul among the martyrs, let my good deeds be (written) in the `illiyyín (book of the virtuous), and my evil deeds be forgiven.

arabic text: وَاَنْ تَهَبَ لى يَقينَاً تُباشِرُ بِهِ قَلْبى
english translation text: (And I beseech You to) grant me a certainty which gives joy to my heart,

arabic text: وَاِيماناً يُذْهِبُ الشَّكَّ عَنّى وَتُرْضِيَنى بِما قَسَمْتَ لى
english translation text: and a faith which drives doubt away from me,and make me pleased with what You have granted me.

arabic text: وَآتِنا فِى الدُّنْيا حَسَنَةً وَفِى الاْخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً
english translation text: (And I beseech You to) Give us good in this world, and good in the Hereafter,

arabic text: وَقِنا عَذابَ النّارِ الْحَريقِ
english translation text: and save us from the punishment of the burning fire. (2:201)

arabic text: وَارْزُقْنى فيها ذِكْرَكَ وَشُكْرَكَ وَالرَّغْبَةَ اِلَيْكَ
english translation text: (And I beseech You to) grant me in it (Night of Qadr) Your remembrance, and Your gratitude, and desire for (pleasing) You,

arabic text: وَالْاِنابَةَ وَالتَّوْفيقَ لِما وَفَّقْتَ لَهُ مُحَمَّداً وَ الِ مُحَمَّدٍ
english translation text: turning (to You for repentance), and success, for all that You have granted Muhammad and his family,

arabic text: عَلَيْهِ وَعَلَيْهِمُ السَّلامُ
english translation text: peace be on him and on them.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah, bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
